included_relationships.notes: Immediate family defined in 478-1-.16(3)(b). Self applies for personal illness, injury, disability, medical/dental care, contagious disease exposure, and adoption. Immediate family applies for illness/injury/disability and death pathways.

conditions.field: adoption requiring employee presence for health-related reasons

required_value.field: adoption of a child by the employee
employee presence required for health-related reasons

conditions.source_text: Adoption of a child by the employee when the employee's presence is required for health-related reasons

conditions.field: immediate family illness, injury, or disability requiring employee presence

required_value.field: immediate family illness, injury, or disability

conditions.source_text: Illness, injury, or disability in the employee's immediate family which requires the employee's presence

conditions.field: death in immediate family requiring employee presence

required_value.field: sick leave used for this purpose

conditions.notes: Sick leave for this purpose is limited to 5 workdays or the equivalent of a workweek.
conditions.source_text: Death in the employee's immediate family which requires the employee's presence; however, sick leave used for this purpose shall be limited to five (5) workdays or the equivalent of a workweek

required_value.field: presence at work may reasonably endanger others

conditions.source_text: Exposed to a contagious disease and may reasonably expose others and endanger their health by being present at work

relationship_issues: included_relationships lists 'child' but the regulation uses 'immediate family' which includes child; the broader term is fine, but the full immediate family definition from 478-1-.16(3)(b) includes grandparent, grandchild, brother, sister, step and in-law relationships, and household dependents — all of whom are covered for the family illness pathway, so included_relationships should reflect the full immediate family scope rather than only spouse, child, parent

included_relationships notes mention 'household dependents' but the regulation text says 'any other person who resides in the employee's household and is recognized by law as a dependent' — the label should be more precise
logic_issues: The adoption pathway (478-1-.16(7)(c)1(ii)) is missing from conditions — it is a distinct qualifying pathway for sick leave use
The death-in-immediate-family pathway (478-1-.16(7)(c)1(v)) is missing from conditions — it is a distinct qualifying pathway with a specific workday cap that is part of reason qualification
The contagious_disease_exposure condition field is too long; it should be shortened per format rules
missing_conditions: Adoption of a child when employee's presence is required for health-related reasons (478-1-.16(7)(c)1(ii))
Death in the employee's immediate family which requires the employee's presence, limited to 5 workdays (478-1-.16(7)(c)1(v))
format_issues: contagious_disease_exposure field value is too long and contains full rule logic; should be shortened
included_relationships.required_value should reflect the full immediate family definition from the regulation, not just a subset
revision_summary: Expanded included_relationships.required_value to reflect the full immediate family definition from 478-1-.16(3)(b)
Added missing death-in-immediate-family pathway condition with 5-workday cap nested inside
Kept all other API1 conditions as they were correct
